task:

Port these TS modules to Python:
- ~/github/hoocode/packages/tui/src/utils.ts  → packages/tui/src/cortex/tui/utils.py
- ~/github/hoocode/packages/tui/src/fuzzy.ts  → packages/tui/src/cortex/tui/fuzzy.py

Port their tests:
- ~/github/hoocode/packages/tui/test/fuzzy.test.ts → packages/tui/tests/test_fuzzy.py
- ~/github/hoocode/packages/tui/test/regression-regional-indicator-width.test.ts → packages/tui/tests/test_regression_regional_indicator_width.py
- Any utils-related tests you find in ~/github/hoocode/packages/tui/test/ (search for imports of "utils" — e.g. bug-regression-isimageline-startswith-bug.test.ts if it tests utils) → corresponding test_*.py files.

Rules (mechanical port, feature parity ONLY):
1. Read the TS module AND its tests first; tests define the contract.
2. Translate tests before implementation when feasible.
3. Preserve public names in snake_case (stringWidth → string_width). Keep file-level structure 1:1 so future upstream diffs are easy to re-apply.
4. Type mapping: Promise→async, undefined/null→None, discriminated unions→Literal-tagged dataclasses or plain dicts matching the TS shape. NO pydantic in the tui package (it has zero runtime deps).
5. utils.ts uses `get-east-asian-width` for text width — port that logic to pure Python (wcwidth-equivalent computed from east-asian-width rules ported faithfully from the TS usage). Do NOT add a runtime dependency unless absolutely unavoidable; if you must, use `wcwidth` and note it. Check what utils.ts actually implements (grapheme handling, emoji, regional indicators, ANSI-aware width/truncate/wrap) and port faithfully — the regional-indicator regression test must pass.
6. bun-test→pytest: describe→class/module, test()→def test_, expect(x).toBe(y)→assert x == y, expect(fn).toThrow()→pytest.raises.
7. NO features added, NO API "improvements".

Workspace facts:
- Python 3.11, uv workspace. Run tests with: cd /Users/sachinkoli/github/pycortex && uv run pytest packages/tui
- Lint: uv run ruff check packages/tui && uv run ruff format packages/tui
- Types: uv run pyright packages/tui  (strict mode — annotate everything; must reach 0 errors)
- packages/tui/src/cortex/tui/__init__.py already exists (empty). Add public re-exports there if the TS index.ts exports these modules — check ~/github/hoocode/packages/tui/src/index.ts.

IMPORTANT constraints:
- Do NOT commit anything. Do NOT touch docs/04-migration-plan.md. Do NOT touch anything outside packages/tui except (if truly needed) noting a new dependency.
- Iterate until: pytest green for packages/tui, ruff clean, ruff format clean, pyright strict 0 errors on packages/tui.
